subcodes.first_line: O thou servant of God! Thy call hath been heard, thy intention accepted, thy striving appreciated, and thy sincerity is evident through the bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی ندایت مسموع و نیتت مقبول و سعیت مشکور و خلوصت معلومست از فیض
subcodes.subjects: @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @love and unity
